> **Note on `setInterval` warning:** The only `setInterval` in this plugin rotates the local debug log file once every 24 hours. It performs no network calls and transmits no data.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cheng-Zi-Qing/stepvox/compare/0.1.1...0.1.2

releases.author: Cheng-Zi-Qing
releases.description:
First public release. Submitted to Obsidian Community Plugins.

## What this is

StepVox is a voice-controlled assistant for Obsidian. Press a hotkey, speak,
and the assistant transcribes your request, calls vault tools (read / search /
find / create / append / move / open / properties), optionally hits the web,
and speaks the answer back.

## Requirements

- Obsidian 1.7.0 or newer, desktop only.
- A StepFun API key for ASR + TTS.
- An LLM key for at least one of StepFun, OpenAI, Anthropic, or a custom
  OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

See [README](https://github.com/Cheng-Zi-Qing/stepvox#readme) for setup,
privacy details (what data goes where), and troubleshooting.

## Install

The marketplace listing is pending review. To install manually:

1. Download \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, \`styles.css\` from this release.
2. Drop them into \`<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/stepvox/\`.
3. Reload Obsidian, enable StepVox under Community plugins.
